rounds: The 6am necklace buy — no deliberating, just done — Joy Police didn't get a word in. Painted toes on a Saturday? Theirs was loud before, yours was louder. Chemist aisle, comparing nail shades, not flinching — that one was clean. Sleep going from 4 hours Monday to 8 hours Thursday is your body doing the work even when your head is noisy.
pattern: They're loud before the moment, silent once you've already done the thing.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
